Usage: gs worktree (wt) create (c) <path> [flags]

Create a new worktree

Creates a new Git worktree at the given path. The worktree starts in detached
HEAD state at the current trunk commit.

Use -b/--branch to create a new tracked branch in the worktree.

Arguments:
  <path>    Path for the new worktree

Flags:
  -b, --branch=BRANCH    Create and check out a new branch in the worktree

Global Flags:
  -h, --help           Show help for the command
      --version        Print version information and quit
  -v, --verbose        Enable verbose output ($GIT_SPICE_VERBOSE)
  -C, --dir=DIR        Change to DIR before doing anything
      --[no-]prompt    Whether to prompt for missing information
